evidence: Positioning: Careerspan as a 'human data company'... Logan's insight: 'Why don't we make a 30-second look at the information we capture via Careerspan?'
Video demo should be 'human data oriented' — show the data collection, then the results
Key differentiator: opted-in, first-party candidate data... Reference to Eightfold lawsuit — positioning against publicly scraped data risks

source_display: Eightfold Regulatory Moment as Sales Hook
evidence: Hook: 'This moment in time is important' (regulatory pressure on third-party data)... Use regulatory moment (Eightfold lawsuit) as urgency driver
Shift from explaining to showing — visual demonstration over word-heavy explanations... Logan: 'A deck is not as impactful as watching it in action'
Problem identified: Careerspan's existing materials require too much explanation... Critical assessment of current collateral: Current materials are too explanation-heavy
Two distinct video/message versions: 1. Sourcing/Matching/External Hiring — for recruiting teams 2. Internal Mobility — for enterprise HR/L&D
